title: citrus × aurantiifolia subsp. latifolia
intro: Citrus × aurantiifolia subsp. latifolia, also known as the lime or kaffir lime, is a citrus plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory agent, and is often used to treat digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming lime juice include boosting the immune system, reducing stress, and improving respiratory health, while the essential oil extracted from its leaves is used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of the lime plant include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used in traditional medicine and home remedies.
